## Track / area

- [ ] Track A (Moshi) · [ ] Track B (cascade) · [ ] data engineering · [ ] eval · [ ] infra/docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes locally (ruff + mypy + pytest)
- [ ] New behavior has tests (and they'd fail without the change)
- [ ] No data/weights committed; docs updated if the interface changed
- [ ] Licensing implications considered if a new dataset/model was introduced
